# PR Language Rule

- All Pull Requests (PRs) must be created in English, including the title and description.
- PRs with titles or descriptions in Portuguese or other languages must be rejected or rewritten in English before submission.
- This applies to all environments, branches, and contributors.
- Rationale: Ensures clarity, consistency, and global collaboration across the engineering team.

**Example:**
- ✅ Good: `fix(auth): update OAuth2 token validation`
- ❌ Bad: `corrige autenticação: atualiza validação do token OAuth2`
